column1: 信じればこそ、こんなに腹が立つのだ。
column2: しんじればこそ、こんなにはらがたつのだ。
column3: It is precisely because I trusted you that I am this angry.
column4: ばこそ (precisely because, only because — emphatic causal)
column6: strongly emphasizes that the preceding conditional is the one and only reason for the outcome
column8: ばこそ = emphatic single cause (literary); からこそ = precisely because (same, more common spoken); だからこそ = for that very reason; ゆえに = therefore (formal)
